hyperedges.label: AI discoverability implemented via robots.txt + llms.txt + JSON-LD in index.html
Per4ML core research themes: few-shot learning, transfer learning, HPC performance modeling
bib2json.py pipeline produces publications.json, keywords_computed.json, stats.json consumed by React components
HPC Checkpoint and Recovery Systems: FALCON, FTA, and PhD Thesis all address fault tolerance and recovery overhead reduction in parallel applications
Performance Counter Analysis Projects: DASHING, VERITAS, and CMTbone-comm all analyze hardware performance counters for HPC applications
ML-driven HPC Performance Prediction: PING, PerfGen, and Comparative Code all apply machine learning to predict or model HPC application performance
